findings.title: REST API has zero authentication
findings.description: Server binds to localhost but has no auth middleware. Any local process can read/write config and env vars.

findings.title: API PUT /config/:scope/:key does not validate against prototype pollution
findings.description: The :key param is passed directly to setByPath without DANGEROUS_KEYS check.

findings.title: setByPath does not guard against DANGEROUS_KEYS
findings.description: setByPath blindly traverses and sets any path segment including __proto__, constructor, prototype.

findings.title: writeKitConfig bypasses file permissions enforcement
findings.description: Uses raw writeFile instead of safeWriteFile + enforceFilePermissions. Config files have default 644 permissions.

findings.title: Concurrent writes can corrupt config (last-writer-wins data loss)
findings.description: Two config set processes running simultaneously will silently lose one write.

findings.title: REST API env key input not validated for safe characters
findings.description: PUT /env/:key allows arbitrary key strings including special chars that could corrupt .env file.

findings.title: deepMerge in settings-merger.ts unprotected against DANGEROUS_KEYS
findings.description: deepMerge does not filter __proto__/constructor/prototype keys. Only called from controlled internal pipelines.

findings.title: sanitizeConfigValue exported but never called
findings.description: Utility function that strips functions/symbols from config values has zero callers.
